prompt:
Ultra-photorealistic cinematic fantasy portrait, exact face reference, IMAX pro + stage 5 quality, 9:16 vertical composition.
Full-body composition from a dramatic low angle. Sitting calmly on a colossal ancient throne made entirely of glacier crystal and frozen obsidian, the size of a skyscraper, suspended high above an endless Arctic storm of frozen cloud systems. The throne contains trapped blue-white lightning frozen inside its structure, glowing faintly through deep cracks.
Massive shards of shattered ice-crown fragments float around the throne, slowly orbiting in zero gravity like ancient relics of a lost empire.
Pose: seated with one leg slightly forward, elbow resting on the throne arm, fingers relaxed. Calm dominant expression. Head slightly lowered while looking directly into the camera through premium chrome sunglasses coated with frost reflections.
Outfit: luxurious deep navy long coat with flowing layered tails moving in cold wind, white high-collar turtleneck, tailored icy-gray trousers, polished black leather boots with frost metallic detailing. Thin silver chain with a glowing ice-crystal pendant emitting soft blue-white energy.
Environment: vast frozen storm vortex beneath the throne, endless Arctic cloud ocean stretching to infinity. Floating ice monoliths and broken celestial ice palaces suspended in the sky. Aurora borealis waves moving silently across the atmosphere.
Lighting: cold divine white light from above combined with blue aurora underglow rising from the frozen throne cracks. Strong rim lighting defining silhouette edges. Subtle reflections on sunglasses and ice surfaces.
Effects: floating ice shards, crystalline dust, frozen energy particles, slow drifting aurora ribbons. No smoke. No fire. No neon.
Mood: ancient frozen emperor of a forgotten celestial ice dynasty. Silence, isolation, absolute control, eternal cold authority.
Ultra-detailed 8K RAW, IMAX 70mm realism, 35mm lens, deep focus, extreme sharpness, no blur, no haze, no CGI look, cinematic masterpiece quality.
